results.rendered_html:
dhānaṃ, -nī [dhā-bhāve lyuṭ]
1 A receptacle, seat; as in masīdhānī, rājadhānī, yamadhānī.
2 Nourishing, nourishment.
— nī
1 The site of a habitation.
2 Coriander.
